meaning: adj.未被扩大的,未被扩展的,未展开的
examples: Rolled up in the form of a coil with the tip in the center as an unexpanded fern frond .
Rolled up in the form of a coil with the tip in the center, as an unexpanded fern frond.
Objective To explore the clinical effect of femoral shaft comminuted fracture cured by unexpanded interlocking bone nail.
